name: drax-cc
description: drax-cc — lean, on-demand agentic orchestration for solo founders. The CEO opens every run via /drax-init and CARRIES THE CHAIN end-to-end across six sectors plus deploy (executive→marketing→legal→design→technology→cybersecurity→go-live), guaranteeing artifact handoffs and notifying the founder at every boundary. Artifacts follow a strict sectorial layout (drax-workspace/<sector>/<brand>-site/). Slice 1 (/drax): branding loop. Slice 2 (/drax-site): the CMO-led Site Build Package with the CLO entering early for mandatory legal pages, plus mandatory pricing/blog/documentation pages. Slice 3 (/drax-build): the CTO gates coverage, builds the real site in drax-site/, and verifies it live. Slice 4 (/drax-secure): the CISO hardens the deployment. Slice 5 (/drax-deploy): the devops-engineer takes the verified, hardened site live at draxbusiness.cloud. The run is done only when the site is reachable. Every IC is activated only on demand; every live infra action is approval-gated.
